description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stylized, spiky hairstyle and a distinctive mask covering the face, giving a mysterious or possibly intimidating appearance. He is dressed in a casual, sporty outfit consisting of a zip-up jacket with gradient blue sleeves, a visible undershirt, and cropped pants with side pockets. The figure is wearing open-toed flip-flops, and his lower legs display some colored markings or tattoos. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and ease of movement, suitable for urban or street environments. The mask and hairstyle are the most visually striking features, setting this figure apart from typical pedestrians.
description: A masked adult male with spiky hair, wearing a sporty jacket, cropped pants, and flip-flops, with visible leg markings. The figure has a relaxed, upright stance and a distinctive urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mask, spiky hair, zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped pants, and flip-flops.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue sleeve, leg markings, and profile of the mask and hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, hairstyle, and the relaxed posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the blue sleeve, leg markings, and the side profile of the mask and hair.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped pants, and open-toed footwear
